Halloween (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $159,366,015Details
International Box Office $96,050,074
Worldwide Box Office $255,416,089
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $10,615,375
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $13,320,521
Total $23,935,896
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Laurie Strode comes to her final confrontation with Michael Myers, the masked figure who has haunted her since she narrowly escaped his killing spree on Halloween night four decades ago.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$76,221,545 (47.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.09 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 25.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,928 opening theaters/3,990 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $209,213,350

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 19th, 2018 (Wide) by Universal
October 15th, 2021 (Special Engagement) by Universal
International Releases: October 17th, 2018 (Wide) (Trinidad)
October 18th, 2018 (Wide) (Bolivia)
October 18th, 2018 (Wide) (Albania)
October 18th, 2018 (Wide) (Macedonia)
October 18th, 2018 (Wide) (Uruguay)
Video Release: January 15th, 2019 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for horror violence and bloody images, language, brief drug use and nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2538 (Cert #51734), 8/1/2018)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Franchise: Halloween
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel, Reboot
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Escape, Serial Killer
Social setting: Mental Hospital, Supernatural
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Blumhouse, Miramax Films, Rough House Pictures, Universal Pictures, Malek Akkad
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
